name: Shield Bash
description: Basic attack with 15% chance to Daze target for 3s

name: Challenge
description: Hard taunt forcing single enemy to attack Guardian for 6s + 20% DEF

name: War Cry
description: Soft taunt (increased likelihood) on all enemies + 10% DEF to all allies for 6s

name: Shield Wall
description: Block next 2 attacks completely and reflect 50% damage back

name: Revenge
description: If hit recently: 2x damage + apply Bleed (5% STR per 3s for 9s)

name: Thorns Aura
description: Reflect damage to melee attackers

name: Cleaving Strike
description: AoE basic attack hitting 1 adjacent enemy + gain 1 Rampage stack

name: Blood Frenzy
description: Sacrifice 5% HP for +20% damage +15% crit +2 Rampage stacks for 6s

name: Bladestorm
description: AoE damage with +20% per Rampage stack. At 5 stacks: apply Bleed to all damaged enemies

name: Whirlwind
description: AoE damage that extends existing Bleed effects by 3s
baseValues: Base: 50, Scaling: 70% STR, Bleed Extend: +1 turn

name: Massacre
description: Execute that deals +100% damage to enemies below 20% HP. Kill resets Blood Frenzy

name: Bloodlust
description: +4% damage per Rampage stack. Crits heal 3% HP. Low HP grants bonus scaling

name: Smite
description: Basic attack with Atonement: heal lowest ally for 50% of damage dealt

name: Flash Heal
description: Instant heal. Overheal converts to shield (50% of overheal)

name: Greater Heal
description: Large heal with +50% bonus if target below 30% HP
baseValues: Base: 100, Scaling: 180% INT, Low HP Bonus: +50%

name: Holy Fire
description: Damage + DoT (10% INT/3s for 9s). DoT triggers Atonement healing

name: Mass Dispel
description: Cleanse 2 Magic/Curse debuffs from all allies + cleansed allies deal +10% damage for 6s (cannot remove Nature/Poison)

name: Divine Insight
description: Allies below 30% HP receive +20% damage and +25% Atonement healing

name: Holy Strike
description: Basic strike hitting the target + 1 adjacent (modest cleave threat); grants nearest ally +5% DEF for 3s

name: Divine Shield
description: Grant an ally an absorb shield — a real cooldown (~37% uptime), no longer a permanent second health bar

name: Guardian's Oath
description: Redirect 100% of target ally's damage to self for 6s (the tank eats it — a pure peel)

name: Blessing of Protection
description: Make an ally immune to the next attack (hard-negate one incoming event); they cannot attack during immunity

name: Rally Cry
description: Party-wide +15% damage and +10% DEF for 6s

name: Stalwart Defender
description: +10% DEF permanently. Shields are +15% stronger (+25% if target below 30% HP)

name: Poisoned Blade
description: Basic attack applying +1 Poison stack. +30% damage vs backline targets

name: Camouflage
description: Enter stealth: untargetable. Next attack +50% damage and guaranteed crit

name: Ambush
description: High damage attack. +30% from stealth +30% vs backline

name: Eviscerate
description: Finisher: +20% per Poison stack. If target HP is below %20  +100% damage

name: Shadow Step
description: Teleport strike applying +1 Poison. Crit resets Camouflage cooldown

name: Cold Blood
description: +15% crit chance after crit (2x stacks). +25% crit damage. +10% dodge after crit

name: Barrow-Quarrel
description: Ranged shot applying Mark: target takes +15% damage for 6s
baseValues: Base: 40, Scaling: 90% AGI, Mark: +15% dmg taken

name: Marrow-Piercer
description: A heavy aimed shot; +50% damage to targets below 35% HP
baseValues: Base: 70, Scaling: 135% AGI, Execute: x1.5 <35% HP

name: Over the Barrow
description: An arcing shot that reaches the back line; +30% damage vs back-band targets

name: Carrion Hail
description: A hail of bolts striking every enemy

name: Cold Focus
description: Self only: +40% power and +25% crit for 6s

name: Unerring Eye
description: Passive: the archer gains +8% crit and +8% power (self only)

name: Arcane Bolt
description: Basic attack applying 1 Chill stack (-25% AGI). +30% vs CC'd targets

name: Silence
description: Target cannot use Active skills for 6s (9s with Arcane Mastery)

name: Frost Nova
description: AoE damage + 1 Chill to all. 30% Freeze chance at 2+ Chill stacks

name: Arcane Barrier
description: Light team barrier — its real value is the CC-immunity-while-shielded rider + the break AoE, not raw absorb
baseValues: Shield: 50 + 60% INT, CC Immune, Break: 50 + 80% INT

name: Counterspell
description: Interrupt + add 6s to target's next skill cooldown

name: Arcane Mastery
description: First CC application gains +3s duration. Barrier break deals 50 + 80% INT
baseValues: CC Extension: +1 turn, Break Damage: 50 + 80% INT

name: Scorch
description: Basic attack applying 1 Burn stack (10% INT/3s for 9s max 5)

name: Fireball
description: Primary target damage + 50% splash to adjacent + 1 Burn to all hit

name: Conflagration
description: Spread all Burn stacks from target to adjacent enemies + instant damage

name: Ignite
description: Detonate all Burn stacks for burst damage. 50% splash to adjacent

name: Meteor
description: Ultimate AoE: 80% splash + 3 Burn stacks. Stun if target had Burn
baseValues: Base: 120, Scaling: 180% INT, Stun if Burned

name: Combustion
description: Burn DoT +20%. Detonating 4+ stacks grants +25% INT for 6s

name: Palm Strike
description: Basic attack with 20% lifesteal (heal self based on damage dealt)

name: Earthen Stance
description: 40% parry chance + counter-attack + 15% DEF + 50% soft taunt for 6s

name: Leg Sweep
description: AoE frontline damage + guaranteed 3s stun on all hit

name: Spirit Link
description: Redirect 30% of ally's damage to self (-20%). HoT + 30% soft taunt

name: Zen Strike
description: High damage + interrupt + heal self and lowest ally 40 + 60% INT

name: Inner Peace
description: Parry heals 10 + 20% AGI. Stun heals allies 15 + 20% INT. 5% HP regen above 50%
baseValues: Parry Heal, Stun Heal, Regen: 5% HP/3s

name: Verdant Touch
description: Apply Regrowth HoT (stacks 2x) healing per 3s for 9s

name: Unbinding Word
description: Strip 2 Nature/Poison debuffs from the whole party — the only answer to the Weltering Mire's Creeping Rot curse (Cleric's Magic dispel can't touch it)

name: Blossom Ward
description: Apply Blossom (max 3 stacks). Ticks heal. Bloom heals on trigger/expire

name: Grove's Embrace
description: AoE HoT: Nature's Breath healing per 3s for 9s to all allies

name: Vital Surge
description: Consume all HoTs for instant burst heal (+50%). 3+ stacks: +20% DEF
baseValues: Burst: HoT value x1.5, DEF Buff: +20%

name: Flourish
description: Trigger all Blossom stacks instantly. No Blossom: apply 2 Regrowth instead

name: Nature's Grace
description: HoTs +15% per stack (max +45%). Below 25% HP with HoT: instant heal once

name: Bulwark Banner
description: MAJOR. Brace behind the war banner — the Guardian takes 35% less damage for ~9s (a personal hold, no longer a party-wide wall).

name: Sacred Bastion
description: MAJOR. A sacred ward — a large absorb on ONE ally (a peel for the one in danger), no longer a party-wide shield wall.
baseValues: Absorb 50% caster Max HP on one ally, ~9s

name: Unmoving Mountain
description: MAJOR. Become as the mountain: parry ~80% of incoming blows and regenerate health for ~9s.

name: Light's Salvation
description: MAJOR. A surge of holy light instantly heals the whole party and leaves a protective absorb.

name: Blossoming Tide
description: MAJOR. A wave of renewal blooms across the party — a strong heal-over-time for ~12s.

name: Reckless Frenzy
description: MAJOR. Spend 10% of your health to enter a frenzy: +30% damage and +15% crit for ~9s.

name: Killing Edge
description: MAJOR. A lethal strike on your target (+50% below 35% HP); your next blow lands as a guaranteed critical.

name: Culling Rain
description: MAJOR. A culling rain of bolts falls on every enemy.

name: Emberstorm
description: MAJOR. Unleash a storm of embers across the pack and detonate every Burn stack at once.

name: Nullifying Surge
description: MAJOR. Open a +25% power surge while slowing and silencing the entire pack.
